Document:
# Nanotrasen Career Trainer
1. NT Career Trainers report directly to the Captain and NanoTrasen Representative.
2. NT Career Trainers are to wear at least their company-provided uniform and jacket at all times while on duty. They are free to choose a beret/hat that best matches their primary field of knowledge if they so desire. Additionally, Identifying equipment is meant for NT Career Trainers and [bold]SHOULD NOT[/bold] be distributed to crew members.
3. NT Career Trainers are to be available to all Crewmembers, regardless of Department. They may not only assist a singular Department.
4. NT Career Trainers are not to do a Trainee's work for them.
5. NT Career Trainers are to use NCT Data Chips only to acquire the access necessary for providing training. They are not to use said access for other purposes.
6. In the event of a lost or stolen NCT Data Chip, the NT Career Trainer is to report the incident to their local Nanotrasen Representative or Station Captain.
7. NT Career Trainers are permitted to carry a flash for self-defense.
